metadata.description: BuildWithAI marketplace — install the AI team (advisor, spec reviewer, build verifier, research analyst, owner-proxy) and guided project workflows into any project.

plugins.name: buildwithai-team
plugins.description: An AI team for any project: project advisor with memory, spec reviewer, independent build verifier, web research analyst, and an owner-proxy deputy for autonomous night-shift runs — plus guided workflows from setup (or adopting existing code) through verified feature builds to go-live, with founder-friendly save points.
